months LTC
3 - No LTC but some eligible months CMC
2 - No LTC or CMC but some eligible months PCCM
1 - No LTC or CMC or PCCM but some eligible months LMC
0 - FFS = No LTC or CMC or PCCM or LMC
Null - Not FFS or MA
 E_LTC_COV_MOS Months of Coverage in a Medicaid Long Term Care (LTC) PHP XX
Null/missing = No Medicaid coverage during the month
 E_CMC_COV_MOS Months of Coverage in a Medicaid Comprehensive Managed Care PHP XX
Null/missing = No Medicaid coverage during the month
